masterEntityProfile.address: Corporate Office: B-11 caledon square, Avinashi Rd, Peelamedu, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 641004 (India) | Registered Office: Lily Hill House, Lily Hill Road, Bracknell, England, RG12 2SJ

aboutCompany.brief: Klodev provides cloud engineering (AWS, Azure), AI automation, data management (SQL, NoSQL), Zoho implementations, remote staffing, and specialized software like a Prison Management System.
aboutCompany.fullRiskAssessment: Textual analysis identifies a severe documentation discrepancy within the privacy policy: the listed UK Company Number (8056158581) is identical to the international voice contact number listed for the Indian corporate office (+91 80561 58581). The text also explicitly links the Klodev domain to ProminentContact LTD and InFynd.

summary.aiGeneratedSummary: Deterministic text extraction maps an operational link between Klodev, ProminentContact LTD, and InFynd. A clear typographical entry error exists where the corporate phone number string was duplicated into the legal Company Number field of the privacy policy statement.
